name: Employee Onboarding - M365 Automation
description: Automates new hire onboarding: welcome emails, SharePoint access, Teams notification, and IT ticket creation. Triggered by a new item in the SharePoint New Hires list.

actions.name: Send Welcome Email to New Hire

inputs.subject: Welcome to the team, @{triggerBody()?['FirstName']}!
inputs.body:
Hi @{triggerBody()?['FirstName']},

We are excited to have you joining us as @{triggerBody()?['JobTitle']} on @{triggerBody()?['StartDate']}.

Here is what to expect on your first day:

  • Your laptop and equipment will be ready at your desk
  • Your M365 account is active — check your email for login instructions
  • Your manager @{body('get_manager')?['displayName']} will meet with you for a welcome session
  • You have been added to the @{triggerBody()?['Department']} SharePoint site and Teams channel

If you have any questions before your start date, reply to this email.

See you soon,
IT & People Operations

inputs.subject: Your new team member @{triggerBody()?['Title']} starts @{triggerBody()?['StartDate']}
inputs.body:
Hi @{body('get_manager')?['givenName']},

This is a reminder that @{triggerBody()?['Title']} is joining your team as @{triggerBody()?['JobTitle']} on @{triggerBody()?['StartDate']}.

Your onboarding checklist:

  • Schedule a 1:1 welcome meeting for their first day
  • Introduce them to the team in the @{triggerBody()?['Department']} Teams channel
  • Review their 30/60/90 day plan
  • Confirm their desk and workspace is ready

Their M365 account and SharePoint access have been set up automatically. If additional system access is needed, please submit an IT request.

inputs.message: Please welcome **@{triggerBody()?['Title']}** who is joining us as **@{triggerBody()?['JobTitle']}** starting @{triggerBody()?['StartDate']}! Say hi and help them get settled in.

item.Title: Hardware Setup - @{triggerBody()?['Title']}
item.Description: New hire @{triggerBody()?['Title']} (@{triggerBody()?['JobTitle']}) is starting @{triggerBody()?['StartDate']}. Please provision: laptop, security badge access, and confirm M365 account is active. Department: @{triggerBody()?['Department']}.
